docs.text: Cao Zhiyu 曹智禹 ¶ An ACMer&NLPer ¶ Biography ¶ I am a quasi graduate student in Soochow University, majored in software engineering. Before that, I obtained the bachelor degree from China University of Petroleum（East China） (UPC, China) , QinDao Institute Of Software、College Of Computer Science And Technology in 2022. Contact ¶ Email: dewset@163.com Research Interests ¶ Natual Language Processing Competition ¶ Second National Prize , 11 th LanQiao Cup, November 2020 Second National Prize , 12 th LanQiao Cup, June 2021 Bronze medal ,The 2021 ICPC Asia Shenyang Regional Contest, 20-21 Nevember Bronze medal ,The 2021 ICPC Asia Nanjing Regional Contest, 3 December – 4 December 2021 Silver Medal , The 2021 ICPC China Shandong Provincial Programming Contest
